title: willoughbya fulva
intro: Willoughbya fulva, also known as the Australian tree fern, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Dicksoniaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its rhizomes, which are used to create herbal remedies. The health benefits of Willoughbya fulva include its potential to treat respiratory issues, skin problems, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infused as a tea, and it is also used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
